scrape-cycle.task: Run the scrape cycle: first check daily spend via spend-tracker, then run the unified multi-source scraper (node tools/scraper-engine/scrapeAll-cli.js cycle) which searches eBay, TCGPlayer, and Troll and Toad simultaneously. Analyze new listings with card-analyzer skill (includes auto price verification and memory extraction). Alert on deals via deal-alerts skill. If spend is over 80% of cap, only scrape watchlist cards.

outreach-cycle.task: Run the daily outreach cycle: check daily spend, then load contacts from config/contacts.json. Email all eligible contacts using email-outreach skill with staggered sending (sendEmailBatch). Then call eligible contacts using voice-outreach skill. Respect all cooldowns, daily limits, ISP rate limits, and warm-up schedule from config. Check bounce health before starting — pause if reputation is at risk.

daily-summary.task: Compile and send the daily summary via deal-alerts skill. Include: total cards scanned, deals found, best deal, outreach activity, API spend breakdown, and projected monthly cost.

database-backup.task: Run database backup by executing: node tools/backup-db.js

cloud-sync.task: Sync local data to cloud CRM by executing: node tools/sync/cloudSync.js

data-pruning.task: Run weekly data pruning to keep database lean: node tools/maintenance/dataPruner.js. This deletes old listings (>90 days), aggregates old price history, cleans completed tasks, and removes old export files.

health-check.task: Run system health check using system-health skill. Check disk space, memory, database size, log size, stale data, and circuit breaker status. Alert via Telegram if any warnings detected.

portfolio-update.task: Update market prices for all cards in inventory using inventory-tracker skill. Alert via Telegram if any card dropped >20% or gained >50% since purchase.

contact-discovery.task: Run weekly contact discovery using business-finder skill. Search for card shops, pawn shops, thrift stores, and comic book stores in configured cities. Use node tools/outreach/contact-cli.js find command. After discovery, report results via Telegram. Only search each city once per week.
